description: Create a complete press room section on the WordPress site. Create a category named 'Press Releases' (slug: `press-releases`) and publish three posts assigned only to this category with the following titles and required content: 'Nimbus Technologies Raises $42 Million in Series B Funding' (including 'Series B funding round' and 'Crestview Capital'), 'Nimbus Technologies Launches CloudSync 2.0 Platform' (including 'CloudSync 2.0' and 'real-time data synchronization'), and 'Nimbus Technologies Named to Forbes Cloud 100 List' (including 'Cloud 100' and 'fastest-growing cloud companies'). Additionally, publish a top-level page titled 'Press Room' (including 'Nimbus Technologies' and 'media inquiries') and a child page under it titled 'Media Contact' (including 'Sarah Chen' and 'press@nimbustech.com'). Ensure all posts and pages are published.

metadata.post_1_title: Nimbus Technologies Raises $42 Million in Series B Funding
metadata.post_3_title: Nimbus Technologies Named to Forbes Cloud 100 List
